prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia walks through a gray study corridor where everything unrelated to exams is faded. Only a red study lamp and stacks of books have color. The corridor is heavy but not dangerous; use symbolic pressure rather than harmful imagery.

Core meaning: during the first attempt, life narrowed until almost everything except study turned gray.

Style: restrained Chinese blog illustration, emotional but safe, black/red/white with muted gray, lots of empty space. Minimal labels: "一战", "只剩学习", "坚持".

Avoid self-harm imagery, avoid cliffs, avoid horror atmosphere, avoid overdramatic despair.
